title: Bartfunny
description: Surprisingly a seperate thing from bart's funnies. a mod originally on curseforge that adds like 3 sets of tools which are all stupidly strong.
body:
this mod adds:
dandorium from pikmin as an ore
sparklium from pikmin as an ore
and superium, also an ore.
the waterwraith from pikmin as a boss you have to craft the spawn egg of, with 1k hp and max 1 damage per hit.

originally on curseforge, and now on modrinth.
